title: pkcs11: module doc missing Ed25519 limitation
description: pkcs11_detect_algorithm handles KeyType::EC (P-256 only) and KeyType::RSA. Ed25519 (CKK_EC_EDWARDS, PKCS#11 v3.0) returns 'unsupported key type'. SigningAlgorithm::Ed25519 exists in secretx-core but the pkcs11 backend cannot use it. The module doc should note this so users with Ed25519 HSM keys know to file a feature request or use local-signing instead.
